title: TikTok-style commentary
description: Quick observational posts with capitals for emphasis
text: Bro the way she just stared into the camera. THAT was the look. POV: you finally figured it out. Wait until the end. No because actually that hit.

character_tips.anna: Modern teen prose mixes caps for emphasis. Capture both rhythms.
character_tips.maxim: Generation-Z writing pattern. Real-life applied training.
character_tips.knopych: 🎬 TIKTOK STYLE! POV and reaction commentary!
character_tips.klavochka: The way teens write today, my sunshine 💫
